channel.title: GitHub Zig Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Zig in GitHub

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: ziglang/zig
item.description: General-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal, and reusable software.

item.title: Not-Nik/raylib-zig
item.description: Manually tweaked, auto-generated raylib bindings for zig. https://github.com/raysan5/raylib

item.title: pedropark99/zig-book
item.description: An open, technical and introductory book for the Zig programming language

item.title: zigtools/zls
item.description: A Zig language server supporting Zig developers with features like autocomplete and goto definition

item.title: rockorager/libvaxis
item.description: a modern tui library written in zig

item.title: zig-gamedev/zig-gamedev
item.description: Dev repo for @zig-gamedev libs and sample applications

item.title: tigerbeetle/tigerbeetle
item.description: The financial transactions database designed for mission critical safety and performance.

item.title: hexops/mach
item.description: zig game engine & graphics toolkit

item.title: mitchellh/libxev
item.description: libxev is a cross-platform, high-performance event loop that provides abstractions for non-blocking IO, timers, events, and more and works on Linux (io_uring or epoll), macOS (kqueue), and Wasm + WASI. Available as both a Zig and C API.

item.title: zml/zml
item.description: Any model. Any hardware. Zero compromise. Built with @ziglang / @openxla / MLIR / @bazelbuild

item.title: lightpanda-io/browser
item.description: Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

item.title: jetzig-framework/jetzig
item.description: Jetzig is a web framework written in Zig

item.title: capy-ui/capy
item.description: 💻Build one codebase and get native UI on Windows, Linux and Web

item.title: kristoff-it/superhtml
item.description: HTML Language Server & Templating Language Library

item.title: riverwm/river
item.description: [mirror] A dynamic tiling Wayland compositor

item.title: ZigEmbeddedGroup/microzig
item.description: Unified abstraction layer and HAL for several microcontrollers

item.title: neurocyte/flow
item.description: Flow Control: a programmer's text editor

item.title: kristoff-it/zine
item.description: Fast, Scalable, Flexible Static Site Generator (SSG)

item.title: marler8997/zigup
item.description: Download and manage zig compilers.

item.title: NilsIrl/dockerc
item.description: container image to single executable compiler
